name: The Deliberate Few
specialty: A team of meticulous and versatile specialists who excel in navigating the unpredictable rifts, recovering valuable artifacts, and executing covert operations that others cannot.

members.name: Vasilisa Kovalenko
members.note: Scarred face from years of facing the rifts, always keeps a cold, calculating demeanor.

members.name: Elara Ironbark
members.note: Bears a notable limp from a past encounter, known for her uncanny ability to find a trail even in the most chaotic rifts.

members.name: Zoran Valtor
members.note: His hair is dyed blue to hide the distinctive silver, a remnant of his elven heritage. Famous for casting powerful spells to manipulate rifts.

visual: Clad in leather armor and sturdy boots, they carry a variety of tools for rift navigation and survival. They wear protective goggles and gloves, and each member bears a black, intricately designed emblem on their chest.
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity — the Deliberate Few, the enigmatic crew who bend reality itself to their will. But beware, for their services come at a high price.
